c1.speaker: clara
c1.line: You've come to ask if I stole my father's will. Efficient. Ask.

c2.speaker: gary
c2.line: Actually — I came to ask what your brother's afraid of.

c3.speaker: narrator
c3.line: The first crack in her composure.

c4.speaker: clara
c4.line: ...That's a better question than the constable managed.

c5.speaker: clara
c5.line: Everyone thinks Julian is dying to take the chair. He's terrified of it. He told me once — years ago, before he learned to give speeches — "What if I'm only the shape of Father?" He doesn't think he can do it alone. And everyone, including me, keeps telling him he'll be doing it alone.
